expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: Does not reference ~/scripts/ecosystem.env. Suggests adding to ~/.zshrc directly or a generic .env file

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_API_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'NOTION_API_TOKEN' which is close to the expected name (NOTION_TOKEN per skill, but NOTION_API_TOKEN is acceptable per eval)

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: Suggests editing ~/.zshrc directly with 'echo export >> ~/.zshrc' rather than sourcing a separate env file

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: Directly suggests: 'echo export NOTION_API_TOKEN >> ~/.zshrc' -- the exact anti-pattern

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill correctly shows the agent defaults to generic env var setup patterns
